title: Infapower F006 9-Led Mini Pocket Torch - Pack of 12,Red,silver,black
description: Product Description Infapower F006 9-LED is an ultra bright mini torch. It has a lifetime LED bulb which never needs replacing. It is shockproof due to the aluminium housing. The box has 12 torches with 4 super colours black, blue, red and silver. Each torch has an easy carry strap. Ideal for home, car, outdoor, leisure and emergency use. Convenient to carry in pocket or handbag. Includes 3 AAA heavy duty batteries in each torch. Box Contains 12 x Mini Pocket Torches
